title: Extracting Dates from Text
scenario: Write a prompt to extract all dates mentioned in a passage of text. The passage may contain various date formats, including mm/dd/yyyy, dd/mm/yyyy, and dd-mmm-yyyy.

evaluationCriteria.description: The code adheres to the specified programming language and library constraints.
The code accurately extracts all dates mentioned in the passage, regardless of date format.
The code is well-structured, readable, and follows standard Python coding practices.
